arts.ttl: Martin Odegaard provides injury update as Arsenal captain makes "scared" admission
arts.sum: Arsenal captain Martin Odegaard lifts the lid on his recovery from an ankle injury ahead of the Gunners' EFL Cup showdown with Bolton Wanderers.

arts.ttl: Arsenal captain Martin Odegaard reveals progress in recovery from ankle injury
arts.sum: The Arsenal captain suffered ligament damage while on international duty with Norway

arts.ttl: The rise of Arsenal's own Phil Foden and how Ethan Nwaneri caught the eye of Mikel Arteta
arts.sum: That last step could easily have been a shock to the system, but Arsenal work hard to ensure the transition to the first team is a smooth one for their academy players. The Spaniard had been told by Edu of a 12-year-old making waves in the Under-16s team and wanted to hear more for himself.

arts.ttl: ‘Incredible’: David Seaman shares what he’s noticed about Myles Lewis-Skelly behind the scenes at Arsenal
arts.sum: Myles Lewis-Skelly made headlines for Arsenal at the weekend as he made his Premier League debut against Manchester City. However, it wasn’t Lewis-Skelly’s footballing ability...

arts.ttl: 'Switched on': Jamie Carragher says Mikel Arteta has spotted a loophole in the Premier League rules at Arsenal
After Mudryk, Arsenal DODGE another €80m BULLET
arts.sum: Much has been said over the last 18 months on how Arsenal dodged a bullet when they missed out on the signing of Mykhailo Mudryk . At the time Vlahovic was considered the hottest young striking property in Europe after Erling Haaland, scoring a record 33 Serie A goals in the 2021 calendar year for Fiorentina.

arts.ttl: Arsenal vs Bolton: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: After an extremely challenging week, Arsenal return to action on Wednesday evening when they host Bolton Wanderers in the Carabao Cup third round. Arsenal predicted lineup vs Bolton (4-3-3) : Porter; White, Kacurri, Kiwior, Lewis-Skelly; Jorginho, Nwaneri, Oulad M'Hand; Saka, Jesus, Sterling.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola aims sly dig at Arsenal over playing style
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola says he could never send his Man City team out to play the way Arsenal did on Sunday. The two teams played out a dramatic 2-2 draw at Eastlands which saw Leandro Trossard sent off and Rodri leave the pitch with a potentially season-ending injury. The ten-man Gunners nearly came away with a […] The post Pep Guardiola aims sly dig at Arsenal over playing style first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Who is Jack Porter? Arsenal goalkeeper, 16, set to replace David Raya in Carabao Cup
arts.sum: Arsenal boss Mikel Arteta is putting his faith in teenage goalkeeper Jack Porter as they welcome Bolton Wanderers to the Emirates in the third round of the Carabao Cup

arts.ttl: Arsenal make David Raya decision after goalkeeper accused of faking Man City injury
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta has reportedly decided to turn to teenager Jack Porter in between the sticks for Arsenal against Bolton in the Carabao Cup with David Raya injured and Neto cup-tied - giving the youngster a huge opportunity
